cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

set(MQTT_RELEASE "v1.3.15")

if(BUILD_MQTT_W_SSL)
	set(MQTT_PROJECT_ARGS_SSL -DPAHO_WITH_SSL=TRUE)
	if(BUILD_MQTT_W_LIBRESSL)
		list(APPEND MQTT_PROJECT_ARGS_SSL
			-DPAHO_WITH_LIBRESSL=TRUE
			-DLIBRESSL_ROOT_DIR=${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/libressl/src/libressl-build
		)
	endif()

	if("${BUILD_TARGET}" STREQUAL "NEST" AND NOT EXISTS "${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/patch_applied")
		set(SNI_PATCH patch -N -p1 -i ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/sni.patch)
		set(SNI_PATCH_WRAPPER ${SNI_PATCH} && touch ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/patch_applied)
	endif()
endif()

ExternalProject_Add(mqtt
	GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/eclipse-paho/paho.mqtt.c.git
	GIT_TAG ${MQTT_RELEASE}
	GIT_SHALLOW ON
	GIT_PROGRESS ON
	PREFIX ${CMAKE_BINARY_DIR}/mqtt
	PATCH_COMMAND ${SNI_PATCH_WRAPPER}
	CMAKE_ARGS
		-DCMAKE_C_STANDARD=99
		-DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=11
		-DCMAKE_C_COMPILER=${CMAKE_C_COMPILER}
		-DCMAKE_SYSROOT=${CMAKE_SYSROOT}
		-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=<BINARY_DIR>

		-DPAHO_BUILD_SHARED=FALSE
		-DPAHO_BUILD_STATIC=TRUE
		-DPAHO_ENABLE_TESTING=FALSE
		-DPAHO_BUILD_DOCUMENTATION=FALSE
		${MQTT_PROJECT_ARGS_SSL}
)
